benefits.description: HGH provides modest fat loss boost equivalent to approximately 50 calorie daily deficit
HGH provides noticeable skin improvements over 6+ months when combined with strict skincare, tretinoin, and estradiol management

side_effects.description: HGH causes water retention affecting scale weight and blood pressure readings
RAAS-mediated hypertension from HGH; manageable with ACE inhibitor
May feel less rested if waking to alarm; requires 10-12 hour sleep cycles
HGH makes insulin resistance worse or creates new metabolic disorder

protocol_notes: Currently on tirz + HGH + TRT (testosterone replacement therapy). Uses ACE inhibitor to mitigate hypertension. Maintains high estradiol (E2) with 12-hour sleep cycles. Long-term HGH use for skin benefits combined with strict skincare routine and tretinoin.
